description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a matching hooded jacket and pants set, with a zippered front and loose sleeves. The figure has a straight, shoulder-length hairstyle with bangs, and the face is neutral and expressionless. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, with fingers extended, and the feet are positioned shoulder-width apart. The shoes are simple and unadorned, contrasting with the rest of the outfit. The overall build is average, with natural body proportions and a casual, relaxed stance. The clothing appears to be made of a soft, fabric-like material, and the figure is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian.
description: An adult figure in a hooded jacket and pants set, standing upright with relaxed arms and simple shoes. The figure has a straight, shoulder-length hairstyle and a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded jacket's zipper, relaxed arms, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the hood's shape, and the straight fall of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, the jacket's fit, and the straight hair down the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the relaxed posture of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded jacket and pants set with a front zipper
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
